questions.statement: &ldquo;Can you prove you have courage?&rdquo; said father with a scowl. Choose the meaning of the word &ldquo;scowl&rdquo;.

<p><u style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-weight: 700;">Direction</span></u><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><strong>:</strong>&nbsp;</span><span style="font-weight: 700;">Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the given underlined word and mark your response accordingly.</span></p>

<p>I am not prepared to authorise the labour which would be required to ascertain and classify the causes of <u>cessations</u>.</p>

<p><strong>Direction: Select the most appropriate word for the given group of words.</strong></p>

<p>Partial or total loss of memory</p>
<p><strong>In the following question, four words are given out of which one word is incorrectly spelt. Find the incorrectly spelt word.</strong></p>

<p><strong>Directions</strong>: Each item in this section has a sentence with three underlined parts labelled as (a), (b) and (c). Read each sentence to find out whether there is any error in any underlined part and indicate your response. on the Answer Sheet against the corresponding letter i.e., (a) or (b) or (c). If you find no error, your response should be indicated as (d).&nbsp;</p>

<p>The heat absorbed(A)/ is converted into(B)/ mechanical energy off a heat engine.(C)/&nbsp;No error(D)</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">Some parts of the sentence have errors and some have none. Find out which part of the sentence has an error. The number of parts is your answer. If there is no error, your answer is D i.e. No error.</span></p>

<p>Each person&#39;s genetic (A)/code is most unique except in (B)/the case of identical twins. (C)/No error (D)</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate collocation to fill in the blank.</p>

<p>I am _______ see you again.</p>

<p>Choose the appropriate conjunction for the given sentence.</p>

<p>__________ the alarm goes off, I hit the snooze button.</p>

<p><strong>In the following question, a sentence / a part of the sentence is underlined. Below are given alternatives to the underlined part which may improve the sentence. Choose the correct alternative. In case no improvement is required, choose &quot;No Improvement&quot; option.&nbsp;</strong></p>

<p>My parents <u>will reach</u> Delhi by Monday next.&nbsp;</p>
